title: Dynamic Tool Registry
constraints: The agent must have access to all 15 tools in the registry
Only 3-4 relevant tools should be exposed to the LLM per query
Tool selection must be based on the user's query, not hardcoded
The agent must still work correctly if a query spans multiple categories
hints: Embed tool descriptions and use semantic similarity to select the most relevant tools per query
Create a routing layer that maps query keywords or intent to tool categories before passing them to the agent
You can use a lightweight LLM call to pick the top-k tools from the registry based on the user's question

evaluationCriteria.label: Only relevant tools are exposed
evaluationCriteria.description: The LLM receives 3-4 tools per query, not all 15

evaluationCriteria.label: Selection is query-driven
evaluationCriteria.description: Tool selection is based on the user's query content, not hardcoded

evaluationCriteria.label: Selected tools are appropriate
evaluationCriteria.description: The exposed tools match the intent of the user's query
